title: pavonia baillonii
intro: Pavonia baillonii, also known as the tropical hibiscus, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pavonia baillonii include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pavonia baillonii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
